description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 3 hrs 55 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 1 hr 23 mins. His WakaTime activity was split mainly across Java (51%), Other (29%), and Markdown (17%) across 3 projects. GitHub shows no commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
